title: VestPositionsResponseDto
description: Individual xSYK vesting position for a user account

account.description: Ethereum address of the position holder

xSykAmount.description: Amount of xSYK tokens in this vest position

sykAmount.description: Amount of SYK tokens that will be received upon vest completion

vestIndex.description: Unique index identifier for this vest position

blockTimestamp.description: Unix timestamp of the block when this position was created

transactionHash.description: Transaction hash of the vest position creation transaction
